message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.sort_values + sort_index (6 cases)

Append 6 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.sort_values and
Series.sort_index reordering operations:

- sort_values_ascending, sort_values_descending, sort_values_with_nulls_last
- sort_index_ascending, sort_index_descending, sort_index_already_sorted

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle, parses the expected
Series, runs the Rust implementation (sort_values/sort_values_na/
sort_index), and asserts parity via compare_series_expected. The
nulls-last variant uses sort_values_na to match pandas' default
na_position="last".

[bd-frankenpandas-gvdmx]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
